description: Fixed silent data quality bug in Cat 53 _ats_rate(): `if home_only:` treated `home_only=False` as falsy, making ats53_a_away_only (road ATS rate) return all-game rate — identical to ats53_a_season. Fixed by using `if home_only is True:` / `elif home_only is False:` guards, matching the correct pattern already used in Cat 54 _ou_rate(). Feature ats53_a_away_only now correctly filters to away (road) games only.
root_cause: Boolean falsy check `if home_only:` silently ignored `home_only=False` kwarg. Feature ats53_a_away_only was computing all-game ATS rate (duplicate of ats53_a_season) instead of road-only ATS rate. No crash, no warning — silent wrong value.

test_suite.note: No regressions expected — fix is in a helper function inside Cat 53 try block; fallback row still intact.

audit_findings.detail: 4 bare except: blocks in odds parsing (lines 271, 276, 284, 288) — FIXED iter 9
9 bare except: blocks in datetime helpers — FIXED iter 11
1 bare except: in CV model fitting (line 7060) — FIXED iter 12
ats53_a_away_only was silently computing all-game ATS rate due to `if home_only:` treating False as falsy — FIXED this iteration

next_iteration.method: Verify _team_ats and _team_ou trackers are populated correctly for opening-day games (empty records → correct 0.5 defaults). Also consider auditing any other boolean flag parameters in helper functions for the same `if flag:` vs `if flag is True:` pattern. Cat 52-54 are newest and most likely to have related issues.
